title: cleisostoma chrysomelas
intro: Cleisostoma chrysomelas is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, specifically found in countries such as Thailand and Malaysia, and is a type of terrestrial orchid characterized by its small, yellow flowers. Traditionally, Cleisostoma chrysomelas has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cleisostoma chrysomelas include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
